use_cases: Call-to-action button with animated arrow icons for navigation prompts
Interactive button with hover reveal effects for product pages
Sleek CTA button for landing pages requiring attention-grabbing micro-interactions
Progressive disclosure button element for step-by-step flows
Visual anchor button for guiding user attention in marketing layouts
ai_summary: A sophisticated animated button component featuring a layered structure with a background layer, inner text container, and dual arrow icons. The button appears to offer a 'sneaky' cursor-following or hidden-reveal interaction pattern based on its class naming conventions. Includes embedded SVG arrow graphics and a gradient-styled background span for enhanced visual depth. Designed for SaaS and e-commerce interfaces requiring engaging micro-interactions without overwhelming the user.
